title: Add the decision and risk item kinds
description:
Add `decision` and `risk` as markdown-first item kinds, configured and indexed alongside `requirement`, so that decisions and risks authored in issue descriptions become addressable, queryable items. Their link namespaces (`per:` for decisions, `mitigates:`/`resolves:` for risks) reference items by qualified id. The markdown description remains the sole source of truth: items are parsed and indexed from descriptions with no duplicated structured store. Indexing reuses the generic triple-driven parse path the existing `requirement` kind already uses.

This is the markdown-first half of the cross-substrate model; it is sized at story altitude and will be broken into tasks.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] `jit item list --kind decision` returns decision items parsed from issue descriptions.
- [hard] `jit item list --kind risk` returns risk items parsed from issue descriptions.
- [hard] A `per:<qualified-id>` label resolves to the addressed decision item.
- [hard] A `mitigates:<qualified-id>` (and `resolves:<qualified-id>`) label resolves to the addressed risk item.
- [hard] The markdown description is the only source for decision and risk items; no parallel structured store duplicates them.
